name: Pea & Carrot Salad with Lovage
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the baby carrots.
2. Combine the sliced carrots with fresh peas and steam for no more than 15 minutes.
3. Cool slightly.
4. Mix together the mayonnaise and natural yogurt.
5. Add the Dijon mustard to the mixture.
6. Fold in the chopped lovage, followed by the peas and cooled carrots.
7. Allow the salad to cool completely before serving.
